summary: Backend testing for Conversation Intelligence module - Pronoun Resolution, Follow-up Context, and Tip Card Generation. All 20 tests passed (100%). Intelligence system working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Pronoun Resolution Working: 'that one' correctly resolves to last shown item (Birthday Cake for Dogs)
'the first one' correctly resolves to first item in last_shown_items (Organic Dog Treats)
Follow-up Context Working: 'cheaper ones' enhances to 'cheaper birthday cakes' preserving original search context
'show me more' detected as follow-up for expanding results
'can I include eggs' detected as follow-up for meal plan discussion
Tip Card Generation: Meal plan requests return 0 products (advisory mode) - correct behavior
Intelligence metadata returned in API response with proper structure
last_search_context returned for frontend to pass back on next message
Edge cases handled: empty input, null last_shown_items, null last_search_context all handled gracefully
MemoryWhisper component integrated in frontend at lines 3149-3154
Frontend tracks last_shown_items and last_search_context at lines 2221-2244
seed_data_creation: None - tests use mock data for last_shown_items and last_search_context
context_for_next_testing_agent: Conversation Intelligence fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Pronoun resolution (that one → last item, first one → first item), 2) Follow-up context preservation (cheaper ones → includes original search query), 3) Tip card generation (meal plans return no products), 4) Intelligence metadata in API response. MemoryWhisper component integrated in frontend but not UI tested as this was backend-only request.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All tests passed. The conversation intelligence module at /app/backend/conversation_intelligence.py correctly implements: detect_pronoun_reference(), detect_follow_up_intent(), resolve_conversation_references(), and should_generate_tip_card(). Frontend integration at MiraDemoPage.jsx lines 2058-2064 passes last_shown_items and last_search_context to API, and lines 2217-2244 track the intelligence response for next message.
